basic_details.job_title: Utkal Balashram Nabarangpur Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for DEO, Para Medical Staff and More Posts
basic_details.post_name: DEO, Para Medical Staff and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: Utkal Balashram Nabarangpur DEO, Para Medical Staff and More Posts Notification 2026 has been released on 09 June 2026 on the official website of Utkal Balashram Nabarangpur. A total of 8 vacancies have been announced through the Utkal Balashram Nabarangpur Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 21 years Maximum Age: 45 years Age as on 01 April 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: PG preferably in Commerce/MBA (Finance) with computer proficiency, Graduate in Science/ Social Science/ Home Science, Diploma in Pharmacy/ Medicine/ Ayurvedic /Homeopathic/Unani, Bachelor/ Diploma in Art & Craft, Bachelor Degree in any discipline (Trained Science Graduate preferably in Math & Science), Under Matric (8th to 10th Fail), Graduate with PGDCA
qualification.details: Store Keeper-cum-Accountant: PG preferably in Commerce/MBA (Finance) with computer proficiency. (preferable 3 years experience) House Mother: Graduate in Science/ Social Science/ Home Science. (preferable 3 years experience in Child Care Institution/any hostel) Para Medical Staff: Compounder/Pharmacists having Diploma in Pharmacy/ Medicine/ Ayurvedic /Homeopathic/Unani from institutions recognized by Govt. of India (preferable 3 years experience) Art & Craft-cum- Music Teacher: Bachelor/ Diploma in Art & Craft (preferable 3 years experience) Educator: Bachelor Degree in any discipline (Trained Science Graduate preferably in Math & Science) (preferable 3 years experience) Helper-cum-Night Watchman: Under Matric (8th to 10th Fail) (preferable 3 years experience) Data Entry Operator: Graduate with PGDCA (preferable 2 years' experience)

salary_details.details: Store Keeper-cum-Accountant: Rs. 18,536/- per month House Mother: Rs. 14,564/- per month Para Medical Staff: Rs. 11,916/- per month Art & Craft-cum- Music Teacher: Rs. 10,000/- per month Educator: Rs. 10,000/- per month Helper-cum-Night Watchman: Rs. 7,944/- per month Data Entry Operator: Rs. 5,100/- per month

selection_process: Career Marking Certificate Verification Merit List
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 15-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of Utkal Balashram Nabarangpur to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for Utkal Balashram Nabarangpur Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for the Utkal Balashram Nabarangpur Various Posts Recruitment 2026 is 15th June 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in Utkal Balashram Nabarangpur Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 8 vacancies announced for various posts in the Utkal Balashram Nabarangpur Recruitment 2026. These positions offer a great opportunity for eligible candidates.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum and maximum age limit for the posts?
faq.answer: The minimum age limit for all the posts is 21 years, and the maximum age limit is 45 years as of 01 April 2026. Age relaxation details are available in the official notification.

faq.question: Q4. What is the application fee for Utkal Balashram Nabarangpur Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: As per the official notification, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the Utkal Balashram Nabarangpur Recruitment 2026.

faq.question: Q5. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Utkal Balashram Nabarangpur Recruitment 2026 includes Career Marking, Certificate Verification, and the final Merit List preparation.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary structure for the recruited candidates?
faq.answer: The salary for the recruited candidates ranges from Rs. 5,100/- to Rs. 18,536/- per month, depending on the specific post and its responsibilities.

faq.question: Q7. What are the educational qualifications required for the posts?
faq.answer: Educational qualifications vary by post, ranging from Under Matric (8th to 10th Fail) to Post Graduate degrees (Commerce/MBA) and diplomas in specific fields like Pharmacy and Art & Craft.

faq.question: Q8. Is this a contractual job?
faq.answer: Yes, the Utkal Balashram Nabarangpur Recruitment 2026 is for contractual positions. This offers a structured employment opportunity for the specified period.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the Important Links section provided below. It contains all the detailed information regarding the recruitment.

faq.question: Q10. How can I apply for the Utkal Balashram Nabarangpur Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted online through the link provided in the Important Links section on or before the last date. Ensure all details are accurate before submission.
